reviews.name: Christina T.
reviews.text: Ally came and groomed my pup and he came out cuter than ever! Ally was prompt, efficient, and easy to work with. The service is a little pricier than taking your pet to the groomer, but the convenience more than makes up for it. And as far as mobile groomers go, their service has better pricing than other mobile groomers I've canvassed.

reviews.name: Frank K.
reviews.text: Ally was awesome! She did a great job with our cat which by the way has NEVER been bathed or groomed. I will definitely call her again!!

reviews.name: Lisa M.
reviews.text: She did a great cut on him. Exactly how I asked her to trim him. Quick and efficient and my doggie is a happy camper.

reviews.name: Rebecca M.
reviews.text: Lindsay did an AMAZING job with my fur baby! This was my first mobile grooming experience and kind of grooming in general...so I was a little nervous/hesitant on how my dog would do. Lindsay showed up on time and immediately made me feel comfortable along with Finn! I would recommend this company to anybody as they did a fantastic job and my dog is happier than ever. Can't wait for his next grooming experience!

reviews.name: Antonette M.
reviews.text: Another amazing grooming done yet again! Our dog is a little difficult to deal with when it comes to grooming due to his anxiety but he loves Lindsay! Ive never seen him so happy after a grooming until we met Lindsay! She is punctual with her time and is super nice! Before taking Bolt she makes sure we are on the same page as far as what we'd like to get done and she delivers fantastically! Thank you Lindsay for Bolts awesome haircut and cute little bandana too

reviews.name: Behshad B.
reviews.text: On time and fair price and did a great job on grooming on our puppy . Definitely we will use them again. Thanks

reviews.name: Christina L.
reviews.text: I recently had to switch mobile grooming services.  After reading all the reviews and speaking with Shalene from Mobile Dog Grooming, I decided to give them a try and requested Ally since so many of the reviews I read mentioned how great she was.  Since making the appointment I have been truly stressed about our first grooming since I hoped their service lived up to the reviews I read.  I had a couple personal issues and had to reschedule my appointment to a different day and then on the day of the appointment I had to make a location change.  Ally was so accommodating and understanding.  The grooming session went wonderfully.  I am very pleased with every aspect of what Ally did.  My squeamish pup was NOT stressed and unhappy.  All I saw was a wagging tail at the end of the groom.  Thank you, Ally!  You are truly a gem.  Thank you, Shalene, for accommodating all my requests.  I promise future grooms will go much more smoothly.  Price was very reasonable for the service that I received.

reviews.name: Doris J.
reviews.text: Fast, efficient dog grooming. I liked how they pick up your dog, walk them to get a haircut in the van, and walk her back to the house! It was 45 minutes vs. the normal time it takes to get to the groomers and wait around for 2 ++ hours or so. My other dog also got his nails trimmed within the 45 min.

reviews.name: Paris H.
reviews.text: My cockapoo never look this cute before. The service was very convenient and I love the fast response and very good communication with the whole team! Great service! Cat really done a great job on my dog and I like that she is able to get the haircut just like the one I want. She was very nice and attentive too! She also got him a lil Christmas  scarf  which is super adorable !! Will def booked with her again!

reviews.name: Jeremiah G.
reviews.text: My labradoodle has never looked better! Emory did a spectacular job. So kind and gentle with our big boy.  She patiently worked some matting he had and gave him a show dog level cut. And he smells so good!  Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Windy M.
reviews.text: Just finished our first grooming service for our little pup. Ally was super helpful and friendly. She was quick but throughly and returned our little pup happy and clean. Would definitely recommend booking with them. Making appointments are also super quick and easy. They were very responsive and I highly recommend.

reviews.name: Laurie A.
reviews.text: Perfect trim, smelly dog restored to clean dog! Knew to trim paw fur without having to ask. Dog was less stressed than usual too.

reviews.name: Leslie W.
reviews.text: Emory and Shalene were able to help me same day with my floofy foster dog who needed help after being in the shelter for several months. They were speedy and thorough with communication, timely, professional and kind. This boy looked so beautiful when he was done and Emory helped me with some tips for future needs and home care. Thanks again ladies, I hope to work with you again.

reviews.name: John F.
reviews.text: Emmery was amazing! She did an incredible job with our mini Pomeranian. It's not easy finding a quality groomer and thankfully we found the absolute best. Arrived on time, full service took an hour and our fur daughter is a super clean happy fur ball  I'm booking a regular appointment monthly. I highly recommend this company!

reviews.name: Lili P.
reviews.text:
We've been using Mobile Dog Grooming since our puppy was just 2 months old, and Ally has been amazing from the very beginning! She always arrive on time, which makes everything so convenient and stress-free. Our pup always gets the best bath and trim -- he comes back smelling fresh, looking neat, and feeling super soft. 

What we appreciate most is the care and patience Ally shows every single time. She's gentle, attentive, and really makes sure our puppy is comfortable throughout the whole bathing and trimming process. You can tell she truly loves what she does, and our pup actually looks forward to seeing her.

The bath and trims are always tidy, exactly what we ask for, and never rushed. Our puppy always looks adorable afterward, and we know he's in the very best hands.

Highly recommend this service, especially Ally, for anyone looking for reliable, professional, and loving care for their dog's bathing and trimming needs!

reviews.name: Lindy M.
reviews.text: Every groomer I've had from this business has been amazing! Every groomer we've had becomes my favorite. My dog LOVES being groomed by Happy Dog Spa. He looks and smells beautiful afterwards and LOVES the pampering he gets!

reviews.name: Joyce D.
reviews.text: The groomer, Lindsey, showed up on time, listened to my concerns and did an amazing job on our sweet Westie, Rocky. He looks so handsome, especially with his Halloween bandana.  I will definitely be scheduling with Lindsey again in a couple of months.

reviews.name: Bret A.
reviews.text: We've enjoyed our multiple grooming experiences with Mobile Dog Grooming and will continue to use them for as long as we can. Our dog Biscuit used to be so stressed out with previous groomers. But Lindsey really helps him feel at ease. I'm sure he still stresses somewhat but it's a noticeable difference compared to what it used to be. She is so good with him and does a fantastic job! We love the way he looks after his haircut and appreciate the care that goes into it. Highly recommended Mobile Dog Grooming!

reviews.name: Nancy C.
reviews.text: Tried mobile dog grooming for the first time based on recommendations from the OC Doodle group, and it was such a great experience! Ally was wonderful with our pups. Our two-year-old Red came out looking gorgeous, and our three-month-old Scarlette got the perfect puppy treatment to ease her into her first real cut. The bows were such a thoughtful touch. We can't wait for our next appointment--all in the comfort of home!

reviews.name: Karen H.
reviews.text: It's not easy finding a reliable groomer with experience with Samoyeds, but Emmery did an AMAZING job. She took her time and was so thorough. I could tell he was well taken care of. His fur requires a lot of attention and patience, and he had a lot of compacted, tangled fur. He came out super soft and clean. I would highly recommend Emmery as a groomer for your dog! Thank you so much.

reviews.name: Ruth G.
reviews.text: I absolutely love Lindsay at Mobile Dog Grooming! She is so wonderful with my senior Shih Tzu and always does an amazing cut. I'm fussy when it comes to his cut and she never disappoints. She listens, asks questions and grooms Pokey beautifully!

reviews.name: Fatma Betul
reviews.text: We had a great experience with Mobile Dog Grooming. I have a small dog (Maltipoo), and sadly, she has not had a pleasant experience with a groomer before. I was looking for a grooming place for our fur baby and found the Mobile Grooming. Ally is great, and she is super friendly and sweet. Scheduling and communication are excellent too; they are very friendly and responsive. We highly recommend the Mobile Dog Grooming.

reviews.name: Pamela S.
reviews.text: Lindsay does an amazing job Lady loves her the whole office staff is great I have referred you to many friends very detailed

reviews.name: Manny A.
reviews.text: I booked an appointment for my two puppies, about 8 months old, about 25-30lbs each. Cat N. came out and did both puppies on a Sunday. She arrived on time, was great with my dogs, and they look great!  I will 100% be using her from this point forward. I had used a couple other groomers previously and had trouble finding another one I could trust (after my dog had swallowed latex grooming gloves at a groomer I no longer use). I'm happy to have found one I can trust and rely on for great service. Thank you

reviews.name: Nicole C.
reviews.text: Ally did a fantastic job with my very skiddish Shiba Inu!  Will definitely be using them again!

reviews.name: Ariel A.
reviews.text: Ally is awesome! She's really friendly, attentive,  careful.. and quick!! (Which my bath-hating doodle appreciates).

reviews.name: Al A.
reviews.text:
Service was excellent! Communication was easy and our pups absolutely loved the kind attention they got !  My first time using a mobile groomer and our experience was nothing less than great ! 
Alex and Neala

reviews.name: Theresa H.
reviews.text:
We had an amazing experience with Mobile Dog Grooming!
It was easy and convenient to schedule an appointment. 

We also can't say enough good things about Cat! She was punctual and highly professional. Our Pomeranian puppy is a very anxious dog and gets very nervous with meeting new people and grooming. However, it is evident that she is very good with dogs, and she knew how to ease his anxiety. Cat took the time to listen and give suggestions for what we wanted specifically for his grooming as he has a double coat. She was efficient and did an amazing job, and he looks perfect and exactly as we hoped for! We could tell our puppy was very comfortable with Cat afterwards. Thank you so much!!

reviews.name: Meredith K.
reviews.text: Lindsay has been grooming our poodle puppy for a year now and we have been so happy with the service. She spends time with us discussing the cut, makes suggestions, and is conscious. Our puppy loves her and runs right into the van for his haircut. Other groomers we used when she wasn't available are also great - on time arrival, make the best use of their time, kind to our dog. I have recommended Mobile Dog Grooming to other friends and neighbors.

reviews.name: Lynn B.
reviews.text: Highly recommend! Our groomer did a fantastic job with both of our dogs (Golden Retriever and Sheepadoodle) giving them stellar cuts! It's so easy to schedule an appointment with Mobile Dog Grooming-we get in right away

reviews.name: Christine J.
reviews.text:
My new favorite grooming service! I used to go to pet evolution in Irvine but they closed so suddenly and I'm SO particular in who I leave my pup with, because you read and hear horror stories. So I found Mobile Dog Grooming and I love that they come to you!! Something about knowing my pup is being taken care of right outside my home & isn't waiting in some crate is so comforting.

I can tell they're caring dog handlers, because I have such an anxious pup and she wasn't trying to run away immediately and was perfectly fine! On top of being fine, she was absolutely adorable! Exact look I wanted.

Professional, talented & quick to respond. 10/10 experience and recommending them to all my friends and family with fur babies.

reviews.name: Haley L.
reviews.text: Chip has been enjoying his grooms at Mobile Dog Grooming. He has seen 2 different groomers Lindsay and Valerie and they both did a terrific job. Chip always dreaded his grooming appointments but seems in good spirits after these. He is a 17 pound poodle/yorkie mix and they can normally complete his service in 1 hour which is very quick compared to the other groomers we first used before trying out mobile. He also always looks great afterwards! Thank you!

reviews.name: Mike L.
reviews.text: Great groomer. My puppies didn't have any issues and cut was perfect. Will do business again

reviews.name: Mm A.
reviews.text: I've been using Mobile Dog Grooming since moving to the area, and can't say enough good things about the company! They are very prompt about responding to scheduling requests, their pricing is very competitive, and it's the best groom we've had for our schnoodles. 10/10 would recommend!

reviews.name: Courtney
reviews.text: Cannot recommend them enough! Lindsey is our groomer and she does a phenomenal job every time. They are always so quick to respond and always make our Hazel girl feels comfortable. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Lauren K.
reviews.text: I cannot say enough great things about the team at Mobile Dog Grooming. Shalene is so responsive when scheduling appointments and Ally is the best groomer! My doodle is generally wary of groomers due to past experiences but he absolutely loves Ally. She is super speedy and does a great job with my Blue as well. I love the convenience of them coming to me. Blue is always happy to see Ally and comes back looking clean and cute.

reviews.name: Iwona H.
reviews.text: Love the service ally your awesome my baby girl only goes to you. Ally was the first groomer for my fur baby girl since I got her and Ally does a great jobs trimming her nails and fur, especially her butt.

reviews.name: Lauren A.
reviews.text: My toy poodle always looks perfect after her grooming appointment I would definitely recommend!

reviews.name: Marisa A.
reviews.text: Ally is the best!!! I have a mini bernedoodle and she does absolutely amazing every time! I highly recommend this company!

reviews.name: Graham E.
reviews.text: I contacted Mobile Dog Grooming early Sunday morning via text and was fortunate to find that they had availability that same day for our two pups, Mochi and Miso. Arranging the appointment was easy, and as promised, Cat arrived right on time with the grooming van, which has a fantastic setup! Cat was incredibly sweet with our pups and did a wonderful job. We were pleasantly surprised by the results. She mentioned that she is currently only working on Sundays, so be sure to schedule her for that day. Thank you so much, Cat! We trust you with our pups anytime!

reviews.name: Sophia M.
reviews.text: best groomer ever! was searching for a good grooming company for my 6lbs pomeranian for a long time, always unhappy for different reasons, until I finally found OC Wagging Wheels! great haircuts, gentle groomers, reliable mobile services, I highly recommend

reviews.name: Georgia N.
reviews.text: Love this company. They are super great with communication and Cat is always on time. Love this groomer!

reviews.name: Len K.
reviews.text: I can't say enough about this groomer!! I have a recent rescue and she was extremely hard to even get groomed but they were able to work with her be patient played music took their time can't thank them enough for looking after little maple

reviews.name: Monica A.
reviews.text: New to the area with an older multi poo i was lucky enough to find this mobile groomer. So gentle and loving. Always responsive and timely. My multi poo gives Aly kisses as soon as she shows up!  Highly recommend!!

reviews.name: Gela B.
reviews.text: Daphne loves getting groomed and they do such an awesome job!!! Wont try any other! They are the best. They take such good care of  my furbaby!!

reviews.name: Briana Z.
reviews.text: This was my first time using this mobile company after using another for a couple times, and Ally did an exceptional job! She was so understanding and patient with my concerns over my yorkie that has too much energy and many allergies. I highly highly recommend her she was so quick and took such great care of my dog. Thank you so much!!!!

reviews.name: Lorin C.
reviews.text:
I've had a positive experience with Mobile Dog Grooming from the start! Ally has been so amazing and takes such good care of our pup. She does an EXCELLENT job and he looks great for weeks on end! 

My latest experience was by far the best -- my dog was having an allergic reaction on his skin and was miserable. Ally made sure to understand his needs and take extra special care of him and he instantly felt and looked so much better after his grooming. She is so personable and even remembered I was pregnant and gave me a sweet gift. I'm so grateful for hardworking people like Ally!! Couldn't recommend her enough :) I have referred everyone I know in the area to this business!

reviews.name: Eugene V.
reviews.text: We have an older quirky terrier mix who can be nervous but Cat took great care of her! She was happy and looks great as always. Thanks for taking such good care of dumpling!

reviews.name: Anne X.
reviews.text: Allie did a great job with our dog! Communication was very easy and quick responses all around. Allie was so patient in listening to what I wanted and I can tell our dog loved her. After he noticed the car drive away he whined a little! Will definitely be bringing him back.

reviews.name: Jacklyn C.
reviews.text:
I have a 7 year old white Labrador who hates cars and is very skiddish when it comes to grooming and new places.

This was my first ever time with a mobile grooming van and it has exceeded my expectations! Miss Allison was so kind to my dog and patient the entire process.

The entire bath package didnt take long at all and when it was time to take her back, my dog kept looking back to see if the groomer was coming with us! 

She's never left a spa day so happy and so excited with the groomer. Thank you Allison, definitely will be using this service again because of you!

reviews.name: Ana E.
reviews.text: Darling (my pup) and I absolutely love Mobile Dog Grooming! All of their groomers are so kind and do a phenomenal job. It's very easy to get an appointment and of course it's incredible that they come to you! Darling always looks gorgeous after her groom and bath, and they always give cute little bandanas, bows, and crowns, which are just adorable and always make our day! 100/10 would recommend!

reviews.name: Louis M.
reviews.text:
Nice, dog-friendly groomer. Convenient and quick. 

But my text stated what I wanted, was given an estimate which was very off. I paid extra for deshedding but my dog was definitely shedding as normal after (other places I have been, my dog would noticeably shed less for many days). My dog also didn't smell good after a couple days (other places he would smell good for a week or longer).

reviews.name: LaShannda L.
reviews.text: I highly recommend Mobile Dog Grooming! Omar was amazing with my two elderly dogs and I am grateful for how gentle and attentive he was with them. Omar had my dogs looking like show dogs after their grooming appointments. Although I had to say goodbye to my dogs, I wanted to give Omar his praises and tell him thank you for the care you gave to my dogs. Thank you, Omar!

reviews.name: Amy C.
reviews.text: Ally was so wonderful with our puppy! She was gentle and kind. She left her looking beautiful and smelling great! We will definitely ask for Ally again. Thank you Omar for sending her our way!!

reviews.name: Rhonda I.
reviews.text: We had a new toy poodle puppy whose nails were long and hair was gettin wild. I read tons of reviews and looked at a lot of mobile grooming companies.   I am so so glad we went with Mobile Dog grooming LLC.  This is our second time having them come to our home. It's so easy they have a nice big grooming van fully self contained. They just pull up, call for the pup and call me to come outside once she's ready.  Both times we have had the groomer Cat.  Our pup adores her!  She's so sweet and kind.  She is super gentle and takes her time with Autumn so she won't be scared or fearful of grooming. Autumn adores her!  I will definitely keep using this company.  We have them come once a month. That seems like the perfect interval for now as it was about a month before our pup started looking wild again. Thank you, Cat and Mobile Dog Grooming!!!!

reviews.name: Tam C.
reviews.text: Quick service. Very professional. Kind and great with my dogs. Ally was our groomer and she was wonderful. Thank you!

reviews.name: Steven H.
reviews.text:
We just moved to the area and needed a new groomer for our two Lhasa Apso dogs who were in desperate need of a bath and haircut. I was very lucky to find Mobile Pet Grooming. Not only did they respond to my text immediately, they were able to fit us into their schedule very quickly and did an amazing job!

The groomer that helped us was Cat. She was friendly, professional, and gave our dogs exactly the type of haircut we asked for. We look forward to using Mobile Dog Grooming as our new go-to groomer.

reviews.name: Dan B.
reviews.text: My Dog Z loves Mobile Dog Grooming, As a dog dad i can't be more grateful for what they do for my little guy, Highly recommend, very consistent and they are the best with organizing times and just getting things done. Huge plus to have them in my contacts.

reviews.name: Nathan B.
reviews.text:
We've been using Mobile Dog Grooming for about a year now!

Our initial groomer left the company and we started working with Ally. We've been very pleased with the professionalism and the grooming.

reviews.name: Shannon B.
reviews.text: Before/after photos of our  5 yr old Golden labradoodle, Noelle. Cat did a fantastic job on her even despite having matted ears! We appreciate the time she spent!

reviews.name: Heather C.
reviews.text: Everything went so smoothly with Lindsey came and took my little new 6 month teacup multipoo. She looked amazing after her groom. So happy for this business!

reviews.name: Chelsea A.
reviews.text: I absolutely love the easy scheduling and amazing service provided by Mobile Dog Grooming. My golden retriever used to hate grooming appts. Now she happily goes into the mobile grooming van and always comes back looking beautiful! The attention to detail and prompt contact is so appreciated. We love mobile dog grooming!

reviews.name: Michael K.
reviews.text: Mobile Dog Grooming is great.    We have used them multiple times for our dogs in the past year and have had great experiences every time.    Communication and booking are easy, and their prices are very fair.     Hands down, the Best dog grooming service we have used in 15+ years of having dogs.    Highly recommend giving them a try.

reviews.name: Jennifer S.
reviews.text: The best dog grooming ask for Val  Jimmy gets the works flea bath nails teeth anul glands and a shave worth every penny

reviews.name: Rose Z.
reviews.text: Scheduling: Available, easy to communicate with by text. Groomer: Lindsay was prompt, kind, patient, professional, and did a really great job with our anxious, blind, 9 yr old shih-tzu, Momo. He looks great, and more importantly came back happy! We highly recommend and are booking again

reviews.name: Kacey K.
reviews.text: Very impressed with Mobile Dog Grooming! Lindsay does such a great job with my four year old Coton de Tulear. They quickly got us on a regular schedule, Lindsay comes on time, she is usually done quickly, she does a great job, and my pup is happy and zooming after. Her haircuts are exactly what we wanted too. I highly recommend!

reviews.name: Nikki B.
reviews.text: I was always hesitant about mobile dog groomers but I'm converted! My dog is extremely anxious when it comes to grooming and struggles being around other dogs. I decided to try Mobile Dog Grooming and wish I found them years ago. Communication is quick and convenient over text and I'm always able to make an appointment and have my dog seen within days (my other groomer was so booked I had to make appointments months in advance!). It is SO convenient to have them come to my house and groom my baby girl right outside. Lindsey has been so fantastic and is the sweetest person who you can tell really loves dogs. My dog was ready in an hour and a half which was amazing because other groomers have taken 4+ hours. I'm shocked my dog does so well with her because at other places I was charged an extra "handling fee" because multiple people had to hold my dog down in order to groom her. My dog is my whole world so I'm thrilled to have found a place where I feel like she's in safe hands!

reviews.name: Dalena N.
reviews.text: I highly recommend Mobile Dog Grooming, Val showed up on time and was extremely caring and gentle. You can see and feel how passionate she is. This is a huge plus because her calming energy helped my dog stay calm. He generally is very anxious and does not like his nails clipped. However, Val told me he did amazing! Thank you for such a wonderful experience.

reviews.name: Hani K.
reviews.text: Absolutely love Mobile Dog Grooming! Lindsay was our dog groomer for the past few times and she did an amazing job on my little Shih Tzue. We are so happy to find this mobile grooming.

reviews.name: Nancy N.
reviews.text:
It was my dog's first time using a mobile grooming service and she looked so cute after getting pampered by Valerie! Coco loved the experience and was happy to meet her groomer. Valerie was very friendly and attentive to Coco, she followed our typical haircut style I sent her to a T and made her comfortable even during parts she usually struggles with (nails).

I'll definitely rebook for Coco's next groom, she was much less stressed and anxious compared to when she goes to grooming salons! I know she'll be taken great care of here.

reviews.name: Jill E.
reviews.text: So thrilled to find Mobile Dog Grooming! Since adopting our pup a year ago I've been through 2 other mobile groomers who just couldn't cut her snout properly like her adoption photo! Valerie, from Mobile Dog Grooming, has done an amazing job making Lily look perfect!!

reviews.name: Elizabeth P.
reviews.text: Lindsay is our favorite groomer ever! She has bonded with our nervous, anxious dog (he's not easy!), and she treats him with love and care. He always looks absolutely adorable after a session with Lindsay-- we will follow her anywhere. She speaks very highly of this company and their support of their groomers. We have been very happy with their responsiveness in the scheduling process and with the follow up service after grooming. We highly recommend.

reviews.name: Erika B.
reviews.text: Highly recommend Mobile Dog Grooming LLC!!! Great customer service, they provided same day service. Valerie did a great job and made sure my new puppy Rocky was comfortable.

reviews.name: Kali G.
reviews.text: Omar is fantastic! He was so patient and understanding with our 17 week old puppy's first groom and made sure it was a positive experience. Our dog looks and smells amazing, thank you so much!

reviews.name: Kelly S.
reviews.text:
Valerie cut our dog's hair today. She did a great job. She was friendly and professional.  
 The experience was great from start to finish. Everyone was nice and the booking process was so easy. Highly recommend this business.

reviews.name: Brandy E.
reviews.text: Vanessa is great!  My Pups are always looking and smelling good after a visit with her.

reviews.name: Ash T.
reviews.text:
Valerie gave us an amazing experience with them one day before a holiday . Our dog has severe anxiety and every single groomer has had issues with our dog. She was so gentle with him and very pleasant to be around. Valerie definitely has had experience working with dogs like ours . We've taken him to a local vet for 10 years and have never had such care on a first time experience. We are never going anywhere else. Transparency , ease and convenience all on a same day scheduling.

Thank you Valerie !!

reviews.name: Marina M.
reviews.text: We've been having Valerie groom our dogs since December, when we decided to switch from salon grooming to mobile grooming. It was the best decision we made! Not only is it convenient, but Valerie really knows how to groom each of our two dogs based on their breeds (we get breed cuts for our goldendoodle and mini schnauzer). We are more than happy with the service, and plan to continue to have Valerie groom our dogs from now on!

reviews.name: Hedi R.
reviews.text: This was my first time using mobile grooming for our Cockapoo Chewy. Valerie was so sweet. Our dog Chewy doesn't like to go to the groomers but she was so nice and gentle, so he didn't have any issues going with her. Also, mobile grooming works much better with my schedule which is another benefit.

reviews.name: Nena G.
reviews.text: We had a great experience with Mobile Dog Grooming! First time trying to use a mobile groomer and contacted several businesses. These guys were the most prompt and professional from the beginning. I had several questions and they were very polite and professional in answering all my questions. We were a little nervous because of the respiratory illness going on but they take all the necessary precautions and let us know they always do a deep thorough cleaning of the van and equipment before each visit. Valerie came and did the bath packages for my two dogs and did an outstanding and very professional job. She was also very punctual and friendly. We'll definitely use them again for our future mobile grooming needs.

reviews.name: Celia ..
reviews.text: OC Waggin' Wheels is fantastic!  Omar has been grooming our golden doodle for almost eight years now and we can't imagine anyone else doing the job.  Our pup gets very anxious about the grooming process, but Omar can always calm her down and is extremely patient and gentle with her.  He is friendly, skilled and very reliable.  We have recommended OC Waggin' Wheels to friends and family and everyone has loved them.  If you need a great mobile groomer, look no further!

reviews.name: Stan N.
reviews.text: We had a wonderful experience with OC waggin wheels and Omar. Our beloved doggies were cared for and groomed to look so cute! They arrived on schedule, and it was extremely convenient to have them groomed right outside my place. I highly recommend them and will definitely be using them in the future!

reviews.name: Tiffany P.
reviews.text: Omar is the best! He's always on time and is super speedy. My 9 lbs pup is usually done after 45 mins. She's a little fussy and he manages to trim her nails and everything. He's a really kind person and treats my dog with that same energy. Def recommend if you're looking for a mobile groomer.

reviews.name: Mercedes B.
reviews.text: Wow! OC Waggin has cured my grooming anxiety, they actually did exactly what I asked. My dog is happy and looks perfect! Can't thank you enough!

reviews.name: Joe A.
reviews.text: Had the 1st grooming ever for our sweet 7 month old Australian Labradoodle. Searched around and found others who were extremely high priced and most importantly communication was difficult with little follow through. Gave these guys a shot found and highly recommended in our local FB forum. So glad we did!!! They were forthright, easy to work with, on time and most importantly did a fantastic job with our puppy. Highly recommend!!!!

reviews.name: Erin T.
reviews.text: OC Waggin Wheels was recommended to me by my sister, who has been a client of theirs for several years. Omar is amazing and has been my dogs' groomer for just over three years now. I have a senior mini poodle, a senior Yorkie/poodle mix, and a Maltese/poodle mix puppy. They always look great when their grooming is done. I was worried about my puppy being nervous, but she warmed right up to Omar. I've always had a great experience with them and would highly recommend them to anyone looking for a mobile groomer in the area!

reviews.name: Joseph C.
reviews.text: As always, an amazing experience with Omar! He is incredibly skilled and caring with our little one. Omar is friendly, on time and keeps his appointments. Our pup always comes out looking and smelling fantastic. I highly recommend this OC Waggin Wheels for top-notch service!

reviews.name: Maggie Y.
reviews.text: I intended to write this review a week ago. I had requested a short haircut for my dog and had no issues with the cut he received--it was well-done. However, I discovered two cuts on my dog's private area that day, one of which was quite large around 4cm, and the groomer did not inform me. I understand that accidents happen, but with a wound this significant, I should at least be notified. This is really unprofessional.

reviews.name: Alison D.
reviews.text: We had the pleasure of meeting Adam today.  He did a beautiful job of grooming Abby.  I was a bit apprehensive about having a different technician but he was wonderful.  She looks perfect.  Thanks Adam and Omar for taking care of my girl so well.

reviews.name: Sheri A.
reviews.text: I would leave triple the amount of stars if there was an option! Omar at Oc Waggin Wheels has been our groomer for over 9 years and he is part of our family. His love and passion for animals goes far beyond grooming! If you are looking for an honest, reliable, meticulous, kind and gentle groomer than you do not need to look any further. Oc Waggin Wheels is our one and only! Our neighbors have said wonderful things about Adam as well, their golden doodle adores him!

reviews.name: April Z.
reviews.text:
Adam did such a great job on our dogs and they were happy to see him  when he came to the door! 
We love OC Waggin Wheels! Omar and Adam are always great with our 3 dogs!   We've been using OC Waggin Wheels for about 10 years now and they are always on time, friendly, and make our dogs  comfortable during their grooming

reviews.name: Ingy S.
reviews.text: Today is my first time to use OC Waggin Wheels. They were recommended by my neighbour and I am glad for the recommendation! Adam the groomer was on time and was super sweet and kind with my two German Shepard/ husky. He did an excellent job  grooming them and I also had him deshed  them and let me tell you they have a lot of hair. I would highly recommend OC Waggin wheels . I also spoke to Omar who took the payment and equally as nice and professional as Adam. For sure will use again in the future.

reviews.name: Bonnie P.
reviews.text:
Omar is one of the nicest people I've ever met. I've had the pleasure of working with him for 3 of my own pups, as well as having him work on my sisters pups as well. Omar has been grooming my newest pup, a Bernedoodle named Montana. She has a tendency to be shy and reserved, however, he has always made her feel safe. She has been able to hop right into the van with him and get her beauty treatment on. She always comes back looking adorable and smelling great! 

Hayley has been great at scheduling all my appointments and works with my schedule! Schedule quite a bit ahead of time, for the most luck and success with getting an appointment!

Simply the best people around to take care of your fur babes!

reviews.name: Anne P.
reviews.text: We (Bailey and I) just love Omar.  He has been Bailey's groomer for over 10 years.  She gets excited to see him every visit.  He is the best her, especially in her senior years now.  He goes the extra mile for her comfort and safety.   I highly recommend OC Waggin Wheels.

reviews.name: LeAnn H.
reviews.text: Omar has been grooming our dogs for over a decade. He first took care of our older dog with gentleness and kindness. Now he looks after our new baby, Poppy, with all the fun a puppy needs plus exceptional skills and patience to ensure she's well groomed and never afraid. He's prompt, organized and efficient and always listens to my requests or concerns. Kelsey, who handles scheduling, responds promptly and sends reminders for each visit. Truly, the best grooming service possible!

reviews.name: Megan E.
reviews.text: If I could give Omar and the OC Waggin Wheels team 10 stars, I would! I've been using OC Waggin Wheels since 2015, and recommend them to anyone I can. When I first moved to Irvine I didn't know about mobile grooming, but quickly found OC Waggin Wheels online.  The first time my super senior golden retriever met Omar, he was instantly in love. Even through old age and illness, seeing Omar made his tail wag. In 2020 I got a spunky 2 year old golden retriever, and she feels the exact same way. She literally becomes a puddle the moment I hand over the leash - pretty sure she'd leave me in the dust to hang out with him. Omar does a fantastic job, but more importantly is a kind, calm presence that my pups have both loved, and more importantly, I trust.

reviews.name: D L P.
reviews.text:
Our Bernadoodle, Beauford Augustus, has been groomed by Omar for since spring 2022...and Beau adores Omar. I appreciate Omar's patience with Beau, his kindness towards Beau , and his mindfulness of my grooming requests. Omar makes great cut recommendations based on the future weather. Also, communicating with the OC Waggin's team to schedule appointments has been smooth; they are very good at sending reminders. 

Also, Beau always looks fly after his cuts and smells wonderful!

reviews.name: Tara R.
reviews.text:
Updated Review:
We have now been a loyal customer to Waggin wheels for almost two years. How much do we love this service? Well we moved out of the OC area last year and we still drive to my parents home in Irvine to have Omar cut Bertie our labradoodle. She absolutely adores Omar so much that we joke that she doesn't know he is a groomer :) He def is an animal whisperer and we will continue to make the drive from LA to see him. Hailey his wife makes all our appts and tries to accommodate us as much as possible. We are lucky to have them as a reliable grooming service.

reviews.name: Jeff L.
reviews.text: Omar has been grooming my dogs every month or so for the past 7 years and I cant imagine going anywhere else.  I book multiple appointments in advance and have never had a single issue. He's always on time, they always look great, and most importantly, I feel good about leaving Maxie and Charlie in his his care. I highly recommend.

reviews.name: Tiffany H.
reviews.text: Amazing! I was having a difficult time finding a groomer for my dog, as we had a couple bad to just okay experiences with other places. I finally came across OC Waggin Wheels after seeing all the positive reviews and after the first appointment I knew I would not be calling anyone else going forward. My dog has separation anxiety so I really appreciate how sweet and gentle they are with her. She always comes back to me with a super cute cut and smelling great!
